name: SPE gap-ratio is a FEASIBILITY pre-filter, NOT efficacy proof

source_receipts.source_file: artistry7_integration::governance (derived from manuscript RUO statements + limitation sections)
source_receipts.anchor: SPE gap-ratio is a FEASIBILITY pre-filter, NOT efficacy proof

verbatim_evidence.claim: A PASS verdict means cytotoxic free plasma concentration is physically achievable at tolerated dose; it does NOT mean the drug is efficacious. A FAIL rules out a candidate on exposure grounds only. SPE must never be cited as evidence a drug works.

attributes.guardrail_text: A PASS verdict means cytotoxic free plasma concentration is physically achievable at tolerated dose; it does NOT mean the drug is efficacious. A FAIL rules out a candidate on exposure grounds only. SPE must never be cited as evidence a drug works.
